channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Streetlight not working, 16th April
item.description:
Extremely dark
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Newbery Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 51 chichester road and st mungos, 16th April
item.description:
Multiple bin bags with bags ripped open including pampers - health risk

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chichester Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: 80 priory park road, 16th April
item.description:
Someone just left a fridge in the middle of the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Illuminated sign STILL out, 16th April
item.description:
Ref 8432389 Sign light about two way traffic sign is still out. You closed the old report and I can’t reopen it so this is a re log Sign P1762 Light above two way traffic sign
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned accident damaged car, 16th April
item.description:
Car has been left on double yellow line and partly on pavement at junction of Shepperton Road & Crescent Drive for well over a week. Needs to be removed as Shepperton Road is being resurfaced next week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shepperton Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped at Electrical Sub-Station, 16th April
item.description:
An amount of rubbish has been left dumped in front of the Electrical Sub-Station. Can the local team please clean it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Pavement, 16th April
item.description:
A item of broken furniture has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Multiple items of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead

item.title: Rubbish From Split Rubbish Bags Spilled on Pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Rubbish from two bags of rubbish that have split is spilling on the pavement. Can the local team please clear the spillage and remove the bags. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken Furniture Dumped on Path, 16th April
item.description:
Items of broken furniture have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Heavitree Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted BBQ Dumped in Grassed Area, 16th April
item.description:
A unwanted and rusty BBQ has been left dumped in the grassed area (just behind the railings). Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:

item.description:
Two split rubbish bags are spilling on the pavement. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manthorp Road, Plumstead

item.description:
A broken car bumper has been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

item.title: Traffic Bollard and Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 16th April
item.description:
A broken traffic bollard and items of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burwash Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge dead tree branches breaking off, 16th April
item.description:
This dead tree on the pavement has huge branches breaking off nearly every other day, if one of these branches were to hit someone it would seriously hurt them let alone a child I dread to think of the damage. Even to a car if this was to fall on a car it would fire sure damage it. The dress is just outside the path of 19 and 21 pound park road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pound Park Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 in pothole going west on shooters hill, 16th April
item.description:
Huge pothole getting worse just opposite the pub: fox under the hill. Please fix asap!!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement, 16th April
item.description:
Rubbish ha been dumped in Colworth Grove again

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Browning Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven, damaged and degraded surface, 16th April
item.description:
This pathway has been reported couple of times and now the contractor has been engaged. It was examined the other day and marked for repair but the marks are minimal and indicate quick patching in few places but that is not a sufficient repair. The path is uneven and dark after sunset and shall be fully replaced as it will continue to pose trip and ankle twisting hazard by just doing the suggested patching.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Covert, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
